creative.headline: "Bungalows vs. a quiet command"
creative.body: "Older wealth builds bungalows. Ahmedabad’s newer elite command high-rises at ₹3.2 Cr. Pikorua offers curated access to a life unburdened by maintenance."

creative.headline: "Sindhu Bhavan Road. A name ascending." [**30 chars**]
creative.body: "For decades, the city’s most discerning have chosen this corridor. A 3BHK where legacy and modernity share a skyline. Speak with Jitendra directly." [**95 chars**]

creative.headline: "3BHK. A private threshold to Thaltej."
creative.body: "Steps from Ahmedabad’s commercial spine, but removed from the noise. Pikorua invites you to view a home where privacy and prestige coexist."

creative.headline: "Fewer than 10 units remain."
creative.body: "A home designed for multigenerational living, not just square footage. On Sindhu Bhavan Road. Pikorua presents by invitation only."

creative.headline: "India’s pulse. A return, no pretense." [**30 chars**]
creative.body: "For those who moved forward globally but keep Ahmedabad close. A 3BHK where the city’s energy meets understated luxury. Let’s align yours." [**100 chars**]

creative.headline: Sindhu Bhavan Road, elevated.

creative.headline: 8,500 sq ft above the city.

creative.headline: No floor above. No compromise.

creative.headline: Ahmedabad kept this for you.
